title: Codebeamer: Fundamentals of Test Management
description: Set up, write, and execute tests in Codebeamer to verify product requirements. Assume different user roles in a typical test management workflow and configure traceability between artifacts.

modules.title: Introduction to Test Management
modules.description: Understand why test management matters, explore key user roles and the test management workflow, and set up the course project in Codebeamer.

modules.title: Test Plans
modules.description: Learn how test plans serve as blueprints for testing, work with trackers and parent-child relationships, and structure test cases within the project.

modules.title: Test Design
modules.description: Design test cases with steps and parameters, establish requirements traceability, and practice creating, reusing, importing, and approving test cases.

modules.title: Test Execution and Reports
modules.description: Create test runs and test sets, execute tests as a tester, report bugs from failed steps, and examine test results as a test engineer.
